• Win the souls
  • Keep the Revival
  • Spiritual war
  • Confront the spirit of religion
  • Demonstration of power and Holy Spirit
  • Church Planters
  • Multiplication
  • Conquest of the seven mountains (Revelation 5:12)

• Paternity (giving prophetic meaning and belonging to children, provision, protection and inheritance)
  • Deep worship
  • Communion
  • Personal and collective building of believers through the activation of spiritual, natural and ministerial gifts
  • For a spirit of prayer and war
  • True children with the spiritual DNA of the house
  • Order (respect for the authority and government established by God in the house) (1 Cor 14:40)
  • Discipleship (the Church is a factory of disciples and NOT a store of believers)
  • Vision (is the approach to multiplication, liberation and revival), recognizing the true value of souls, is the direction and guidance of God and the Holy Spirit to the purpose of God
  • Revelation (is the fresh activation of the Word of God on believers in the form of rows, activating, changing and transforming believers into legitimate experiences every day, is to awaken what is asleep and let go of what is stagnant)
  • Evangelism (recognize the value of souls and have a passion for them and bring their children home)
  • The value of honor (It leads us to take what is inside our spiritual parents, we must support our spiritual parents financially and in all ways and obey them, this unleashes inheritance)

Estamos abiertos a cualquiera que desee asociarse a nuestro Ministerio con la condición de Amor, Fidelidad y Lealtad. También tenemos la mayor disposición de recibir seminarios que tengan como base el bienestar de las familias y el fundamento apostólico y profético.

Si esta interesado en trabajar con nosotros podrá localizarnos en los teléfonos siguientes desde Cuba: +22690360 o +52550234.
